sharedRules.name: Rip Apart
sharedRules.description: This ability gains extra bonuses if X or more allied units or walls are adjacent to the target, including this one.

sharedRules.name: Dive Bomb
sharedRules.description: Once a round, at the end of own or an allied turn, a single steeplewrack unit may MOVE for free.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Bloodletting gains Rip Apart (5+): and deal 1 curse damage again

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: At round 5+, become immune to graze, line, and splash damage.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: This faction’s dive bomb trait can be used for free on one flock unit a round.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text:
For every unit slot spent on Flock, you may summon an additional
flock unit in free space adjacent to an allied unit at the end of every round.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee, Attack

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Rip Apart (3+): gains piercing.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: This unit gains 1 or (6+) 2 speed. It may then immediately spend two speed tokens to summon an additional Flock unit in an adjacent space.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: At 1 hp or lower, this unit is immune to damage from grazes, lines, and splash effects

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Cannibalize can also be used on an enemy unit at 1 hp or lower, but does not grant tokens if used this way

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Raise Roost gains +1 range and when it creates a wall, it may first pull a unit in range 2 one space.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: May spend a speed token when attacked by an ACT ability to give the attacker -1D on the attack roll and step 1 after the ability resolves.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee, Attack

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Rip Apart (3+): +1 damage and gain 1 speed, Rip Apart (5+): and gain 1 strength and summon a Flock unit in free space adjacent to the target.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Create a wall in range, then grant 1 speed to one (3+) or two, (5+) or all allied units to the wall.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Slay an adjacent allied unit. This unit gains 1 strength, 1 speed, and may MOVE again

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Sonic screech also grants one or two allies in the area 1 speed or strength.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Paranoia deals 1 piercing curse damage, but only counts as +1 adjacent unit

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: When Siren’s Song expires, adjacent allies gain 1 speed.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: MAG

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Target enemy unit always counts as having +2 of your units adjacent to it, even when alone. This effect lasts until this ability is used again or the Siren is slain.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (self): 1 curse damage. Push all units one (5+) or two spaces.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Until the start of this unit’s next turn, while adjacent to this unit, enemy units take -1D on attacks, and self and allies are immune to graze damage

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: If starting turn adjacent to a wall, gain 1 speed and clear a negative token

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: While adjacent to a wall, damage always ignores vitality and armor.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: While adjacent to a wall, is curseproof.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text:
May move through walls, but not end its turn in one. When
moving through a wall, gain free movement until end of turn.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: MAG

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Step 2, then create a wall in a free adjacent space (4+) and gain 1 speed.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage. Rip Apart (3+): ignoring armor, Rip Apart (5+): then 1 damage again and summon a flock unit adjacent to target.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text:
When it first arrives, the Owl may slay all adjacent allied
units, gaining 1 speed or strength for each.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text:
The Owl loses Large (it becomes 1x1)
and gains free movement.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Concussive shriek also slays allied units in the area, counting each as a wall for purposes of the ability.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: SUPER

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Do not deploy the owl normally. Instead, it arrives at the start of round 3 but may be deployed in any free space. When it lands, it may destroy any walls under its space before being placed.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage. Rip Apart (3+): +1 damage. Rip Apart (5+): +1 damage, and obliterate target if it is slain.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self, Splash

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (self): 1 damage. Then, for every unit slain, clear one token, and gain 1 speed or strength. Then, step 1 per unit slain, and may destroy walls during this movement.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 2-4

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (target): Deal 1 curse damage once, to a unit in the area for each wall in the area. The same unit can be targeted more than once.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: If feeding call triggers two or more times before it expires, this unit gains 2 strength.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Horrendous Pecking does not break if this unit moves out of its turn.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Flense ignores armor and vitality if its target has 1 hp or lower.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text:
This unit also counts as wall. It blocks line of sight and can be used for cover like a wall. Effects that would destroy walls have no effect on
this unit.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Rip Apart (3+): +1 damage (5+): +1 damage. This unit may spend speed tokens as part of this ability to reduce the cost of Rip Apart by 1 per token spend.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Until end of this unit’s next turn, after any adjacent unit is slain, summon a flock in free space in range. This effect cannot trigger more than once a turn.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Until this unit MOVEs or steps, any foe that ends a MOVE or ACT in an adjacent space takes 1 piercing damage. On slay, this unit gains 1 speed. This effect cannot trigger more than once a turn.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Allied units may trigger ‘slay unit’ or ‘slay allied unit’ effects on you by dealing 1 devil damage to you instead.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: When an adjacent allied unit is slain, gain 1 strength. This effect can only trigger once a round.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: When an adjacent allied unit is slain, summon a flock unit in a free adjacent space. This effect can only trigger once a round.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Rip Apart (2+): 1 damage again, (4+) and again, (6+) and again, (7+) and again.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own or allied turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-2

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: End of turn

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Summon one or (6+) two flock thralls in range.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own or allied turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Slay an allied unit in range. Up to three allies adjacent to the slain unit and self gain 1 strength and may clear a negative token.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Until start of this unit’s next turn, all attacks against self and all units adjacent to this unit gain pierce and grant the attacker 1 strength after they resolve.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: All allied units in range 2 of target foe are pushed 1 towards that foe (4+) and gain 1, (6+) or 2 strength.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Target a wall in range. That wall gains +1 hp, and counts as +1 ally for the purposes of Rip Apart.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Until start of this unit’s next turn, cannot MOVE or step but self and adjacent allies gain cover from all directions and immunity to grazes.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Slay allied unit in range. Then summon a flock unit in range for every hp it is missing.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 curse damage. Effect: Summon one or (5+) two flock units adjacent to the target.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Range 3-4

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 devil damage. Effect: Then may pull self 2 towards a wall in range 3, or pull target 2 towards self or a wall in range 3.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Range 2

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage. Effect: May step 2 after attack with free movement, and may pass through walls during this movement.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own or Allied Turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 3

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: End of turn.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Self or an allied unit in range gains 1 speed and steps 2. They may pass through walls during this step

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Foe Turn, foe is in range 3

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn start

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Remove this unit from the battlefield. At the end of the triggering turn, place self in a free space adjacent to the triggering foe and gain 1 speed.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Any turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 3

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Self or ally in range is targeted by a line or splash effect.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Reduce all damage taken by the targeted unit from the effect by 1 and the targeted unit becomes immune to any tokens or effects it would inflict.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own or Allied turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 2-3

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn end

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Place a wall in free space adjacent to a foe in range. Until the end of its next turn or until that wall is destroyed, that unit cannot break adjacency to the wall for any reason.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Foe turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 3, Curse

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn start

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Summon a flock unit in free adjacent space to that unit. At the start of that unit’s turn for the rest of combat, repeat this effect. End this effect if the unit is slain or they become curseproof.

sharedProfiles.name: Rapture of the Red Wet Hue

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own turn

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: For the rest of combat, all allied units double their MV stat, Dive Bomb can be used twice per round instead of just once, and units may deal 1 damage to an adjacent unit when they Dive Bomb.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Counts as 2 units for the purposes of rip apart, but not for itself.
